intro: Between April 12 and 28, 2026, ZCyberNews covered seven high-severity incidents tagged under healthcare, with Rhysida, ShinyHunters, and UAC-0247 emerging as the most prominent threat actors. These attacks primarily targeted the healthcare, Government, research, and technology sectors across the United States, Global, Illinois, Netherlands, and Texas. The concentrated activity underscores a sustained focus on healthcare-related infrastructure by multiple distinct groups.
